# Memor PR — Intent First

> Do not open a PR without filling this template properly.

## What is changing?
<!-- In 1–2 lines, what is this PR doing? -->

## Why is this needed?
<!-- What problem does this solve? -->

## Systems / Areas touched
<!-- Which parts of the codebase are affected? -->
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Engine
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Flow detection
- [ ] Impact analysis
- [ ] Other: _______

## Flow impact (if any)
<!-- Does this change any execution flow? -->

- [ ] No flow change
- [ ] Minor flow change
- [ ] Major flow change

## Impact level
<!-- Based on blast radius -->

- [ ] Low (isolated change)
- [ ] Medium (affects multiple components)
- [ ] High (affects architecture / multiple systems)

## How was this tested?

- [ ] Local run
- [ ] Tested on sample repo
- [ ] Tested on real-world repo
- [ ] Not tested (WIP)

## Screenshots / Output (if UI or CLI)
<!-- Add before/after if possible -->

## Risks / Notes
<!-- Anything reviewers should be careful about -->

## Reviewer Quick View (10 sec AHA)

<!-- Fill this like a cockpit summary -->

| | |
|---|---|
| **Change** | _______ |
| **Systems touched** | _______ |
| **Risk** | Low / Medium / High |
| **Safe to merge?** | Yes / Needs attention |
